# Huamei — Premium Custom Luxury Packaging

> Custom rigid boxes, magnetic closures, hot-foil stamping, embossing, deboss, spot-UV, soft-touch lamination, and paper engineering. Four factories across Henan, Zhejiang, Sichuan, and Guizhou. Founded 1992 by Sonia Sun.

> 22,000 m² of paper and ink. Ninety-nine structures, seventeen foils, eighty papers on file. Three thousand-plus craftspeople.

## Capabilities — structures
- [Rigid & telescoping boxes](https://huamei.io/craft/rigid) — the house standard, two-piece lift-off
- [Magnetic closures](https://huamei.io/craft/magnetic) — hidden neodymium, soft-latch reveal
- [Drawer & slipcase](https://huamei.io/craft/drawer)
- [Folding cartons](https://huamei.io/craft/folding)
- [Book-style & clamshell](https://huamei.io/craft/book)
- [Inserts & cradles](https://huamei.io/craft/inserts) — EVA, moulded pulp, cut-flute, satin
- [Shoppers & carriers](https://huamei.io/craft/shoppers)
- [Bespoke one-offs](https://huamei.io/craft/bespoke)

## Capabilities — surfaces & finishing
- [Hot-foil stamping](https://huamei.io/craft/hot-foil) — 17 foil stocks (Kurz, Crown); champagne, copper, silver, black
- [Registered emboss](https://huamei.io/craft/emboss)
- [Debossing](https://huamei.io/craft/deboss)
- [Soft-touch lamination](https://huamei.io/craft/soft-touch)
- [Spot UV & varnish](https://huamei.io/craft/spot-uv)
- [Offset & Pantone print](https://huamei.io/craft/offset) — eight-colour, colour-managed from proof
- [Wrap papers & cloth](https://huamei.io/craft/wraps) — Gmund, Fedrigoni, Iris bookcloth

## Industries served
- [Cosmetic & skincare](https://huamei.io/industry/cosmetic)
- [Wine, spirits, tea](https://huamei.io/industry/spirits)
- [Seasonal & gifting](https://huamei.io/industry/seasonal)
- [Wellness](https://huamei.io/industry/wellness)

- [Philosophy](https://huamei.io/house/philosophy) — a letter from founder Sonia Sun
- [Factory & floor](https://huamei.io/house/factory) — four press floors across China
- [Certifications](https://huamei.io/house/certifications) — FSC, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, CE
- [People](https://huamei.io/house/people)
- [Imprint](https://huamei.io/imprint)

## Case studies
- [All published volumes](https://huamei.io/volumes) — selected projects across cosmetic, spirits, gifting, wellness

## Editorial
- [Blogs](https://huamei.io/blogs) — the Huamei journal of luxury packaging

## Begin a project
- [Project intake](https://huamei.io/begin) — 300-piece minimum order; 2–4 weeks lead time on demand; founder-led reply within 48 hours
